title: search in address bar
content: Hello Long ago I turned off search in address bar. Today it decided to resume search on that area. I searched help and the followed instruction for about:config. I've and see I've already set as required "browser.newtabpage.activity-stream.improvesearch.handoffToAwesomebar" it is set to false. What do I do to fix this. I really find search in address bar confusing.

title: We can't find the site you're trying to reach. How do I fix it?
content:
Amazon Account Services Login and Security When trying to confirm changes to your account information

“The site you are trying to reach cannot be found. Cannot connect to the server named specs.openid.net. If the address is correct, try the following: 

   Please try again later.    Please check your network connection.    If you are connecting behind a firewall, make sure Firefox is allowed to connect to the web.

This message appears and I can't proceed.“

It displays fine in Google Chrome and Microsoft Edge. My main browser is Firefox. Is there something wrong with my Firefox settings? firefox 147.0.3 64Bit
